db.lua:28 — assertion `#l == 0` fails because the line-hook callback fired (or recorded events) when it should not have. Test pattern: `debug.sethook(f, 'l')` then `load(s)()` then `debug.sethook()`. Scope: make ONLY this assertion at db.lua:28 pass; do not refactor the wider debug subsystem. Verify by running `./harness/run_official_test.sh reference/lua-c/testes/db.lua` from project root. Then confirm no regression by re-running the smoke set: `for t in strings closure tracegc big sort math; do ./harness/run_one_test.sh reference/lua-c/testes/$t.lua; done`.

gc.lua TIMES OUT in the 'self-referenced threads' section. The GC walk does not converge on cycles. Look at the trace fixed-point in crates/lua-gc/src/heap.rs and the `impl Trace for GlobalState` thread-visiting block in crates/lua-vm/src/trace_impls.rs. Likely fix: in the post-mark fixed-point hook, detect when nothing new is marked in an iteration and exit, plus correctly drain `twups` / `cross_thread_upvals` mirrors so the cycle resolves. PRE-FLIGHT CHECK (required): run `./harness/canaries/gc/run_gc_canaries.sh` BEFORE editing — capture baseline. The canary `canary_b_coro_upvalue.lua` is the diagnostic mode you need to keep green. Verify by running `./harness/run_official_test.sh reference/lua-c/testes/gc.lua` — must complete within 5 minutes. Then re-run GC canaries to confirm no regression.

gengc.lua:130 — real GC barrier issue (verified NOT a generational-GC bug; reproduces under incremental mode via `harness/canaries/gc/canary_b_coro_upvalue.lua`). Current barriers in crates/lua-vm/src/state.rs:2789-2806 are empty `{}` bodies. `keep_invariant()` and `is_sweep_phase()` always return `false`. Reference: `lgc.c::luaC_barrier`, `lgc.c::luaC_barrierback`, `lgc.h::keepinvariant` / `issweepphase` macros. Retires the `gc-barrier-noops` and `gc-phase-predicates-always-constant` ghost entries in docs/GHOST_ABSTRACTION_REGISTER.md — update that file when done. locals.lua:982 — yield inside `__close` metamethod. Test pattern: `__close` does `coroutine.yield(...)` then returns. Needs the CIST_CLSRET callstatus flag wired and OP_CLOSE / OP_TBC paths to honor it on resume. Where to look: crates/lua-vm/src/vm.rs (OP_TBC, OP_CLOSE dispatch), crates/lua-vm/src/do_.rs (close_protected re-entry). CRITICAL SCOPE: prior agent stalled with too-broad scope.
